title: Create and Print Array
instruction: Create an array of three integers: 10, 20, 30. Print each element on its own line using a for loop.

title: Vec push and len
instruction: Create a Vec of strings with Vec::new(). Push "apple", "banana", "cherry". Print the length, then print the element at index 1.

title: Sum of Array
instruction: Compute the sum of all elements in `let arr = [1, 2, 3, 4, 5];` and print the result.
hint: for n in &arr { sum += n; } println!("{}", sum);
